source_item.title: Jio Financial Services share price jumps 6% after Q1 profit soars 155%; should you buy the stock?

slide1_hook.label: Jio Financial's Profit Jumped 156%
slide1_hook.subhead: Stock pops 6% as lending and payments businesses scale fast

slide2_backstory.label: THE BACKSTORY
slide2_backstory.headline: The Demerger That Struggled to Prove Itself
slide2_backstory.body: Jio Financial split off from Reliance in 2023 to run lending, payments and insurance. Investors have been waiting to see if it could actually grow fast.

slide3_news.label: THE UPDATE
slide3_news.headline: Profit Hits Rs 830 Crore, Up 156%
slide3_news.body: Jio Financial's Q1 profit rose 156% to Rs 830 crore. Lending AUM grew 2.6x and the JioFinance app crossed 25 million users.

slide4_why.label: WHY IT MATTERS
slide4_why.headline: Brokerages Turn Bullish Despite Cost Worries
bullets: Motilal Oswal: Buy, target Rs 315 (34% upside)
Geojit: Rs 273 target on broad growth
Key risk: rising operating expenses next quarter

slide5_engage.label: YOUR TAKE
slide5_engage.headline: Has Jio Financial finally proven its lending and payments bet, or is one strong quarter not enough?
slide5_engage.cta: Share your take below and follow for more earnings breakdowns
